summary: Initialized PhoneBio project context from user objective and source research.
Added Vapi wiring CLI, dry-run payload validation, runbook, and current assistant.server.url shape. Live API call not run because credentials are absent.
Read Ollarma governing docs and probed read-only status. Ollarma reachable but degraded with SELECTION_STALE; Watchtower aggregator unreachable; chain stopped before preflight/smoke.
Added public webhook deployment path, optional webhook authentication, InsForge schema candidate, Nebius integration note, and Ollarma local review receipt.

Added offline-only local Ollama router (fieldbio/llm.py) plus Vapi custom-LLM endpoint (fieldbio/llm_api.py), wired into app, with offline-safe tests. Live local-only smoke against Ollama qwen2.5:1.5b passed; routes verified non-duplicated.

Added GitHub Actions CI, checked-in Vapi webhook fixtures, custom-LLM assistant payload derivation, and corrected the API boundary to avoid OpenAI; hosted InsForge webhook activation is tracked in RCPT-018.

Added make readiness audit proving 16/17 v1 requirements locally, leaving live Vapi phone assignment blocked by credentials/URLs; fixed LiDAR exact sensor matching and custom-LLM raw forwarding so Vapi tool calls survive the local Ollama path.

Verified local Ollama qwen3:1.7b emits a get_protocol tool call without cloud APIs, added reusable make llm-probe, removed reasoning fields from custom-LLM responses, and fixed explicit webhook/custom-LLM URL derivation.
Moved optional Vapi bearer-secret auth into a shared helper and applied it to both webhook and custom-LLM endpoints, with tests and deployment/runbook updates.
Added credential-free InsForge/Postgres migration plus deterministic seed JSONL exporter with source hashes; parser now preserves folded read_aloud_summary fields for voice and backend export.

Added make demo-call local replay for protocol, safety, hardware, sensor, and shorthand Vapi demo turns; tightened tests to assert expected local content IDs and added centrifuge vibration troubleshooting content.

Added vapi/wire.py preflight and make vapi-preflight to perform read-only live Vapi readiness checks without exposing API keys or raw phone numbers; current local preflight shows 401 auth and placeholder public URLs.

Added make tunnel and make public-probe to validate a full public FastAPI app tunnel for /health, /webhook, and /llm/health; updated deployment docs to reflect that Vapi CLI listen is a local webhook forwarder, not the public custom-LLM path.
Added TUNNEL_DRY_RUN and npx --yes localtunnel fallback so make tunnel can produce a public URL on machines with npm and no global ngrok/cloudflared/localtunnel install.

Fixed Vapi preflight/readiness/tests so custom-LLM URL readiness is required only for custom-llm assistants; current hosted InsForge webhook plus google model provider shape now passes local and CI checks without weakening server URL or phone/auth checks.

Changed the InsForge edge-function Vapi webhook to return each tool result as an object, matching the FastAPI/Node webhook contract, and added a Node regression test to prevent result JSON stringification.
Updated the InsForge edge-function parser to accept the same Vapi tool-call name and argument field variants as the local FastAPI/Node webhooks, with Node regression coverage.

Deployed phonebio-vapi-webhook to InsForge and verified the hosted assistant server URL responds to GET plus Vapi-style POST with object tool results and source IDs; added make hosted-probe for repeatable verification.

Added make hosted-demo and verified all five hackathon demo turns pass against the live hosted InsForge Vapi webhook: protocol, safety sheet, centrifuge troubleshooting, barometer sensor interpretation, and shorthand compression.

Aligned README, GSD planning artifacts, Vapi runbook, deployment runbook, completion audit, and sidecar state with the active live path: Vapi phone orchestration plus hosted InsForge webhook, no OpenAI key, and no custom-LLM URL for the current google-provider assistant.

Changed Vapi auth selection to prefer VAPI_PRIVATE_KEY over VAPI_API_KEY and added redacted preflight key diagnostics so 401 failures can identify the selected key source and shape without exposing secrets.

Ran live Vapi create-assistant plus assign-phone successfully using the hosted InsForge webhook and google provider; redacted preflight with the returned assistant ID verified the selected phone number is attached to the new assistant. No outbound call was placed because VAPI_TEST_NUMBER is not set.

Added list-calls and verify-call commands plus make vapi-verify-call for real call evidence. Output is redacted to omit raw phone numbers, transcripts, recordings, and call summaries while proving assistant/phone ID matches.
Updated the readiness audit to treat PHONEBIO_CALL_VERIFIED=1 as the final VOICE-01 proof after make vapi-verify-call succeeds, replacing the older wire/preflight wording.
Added wait-call plus make vapi-wait-call so the operator can start redacted polling, place the inbound Vapi call, and automatically capture matching call evidence when it appears.
Hardened wait-call polling so transient Vapi read timeouts are reported as redacted error type/count metadata in the final wait result instead of leaking details or aborting unstructured.

Configured optional Nebius Token Factory support following the cookbook pattern: NEBIUS_API_KEY in .env, OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions base URL, optional LLM_PROVIDER_ORDER=nebius,local, make nebius-probe, and tests proving Nebius remains disabled without a key. No Nebius API call was made because NEBIUS_API_KEY is unset.

Verified the Nebius API key is valid, listed Token Factory models, ran make nebius-probe successfully with model fallback to Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507, and documented task distribution: Vapi for calls, InsForge for deterministic tools, Nebius for optional non-safety model capacity, Ollama for local fallback.
Added a pre-field setup checklist and make prefield-check command so the operator can verify voice-first, call-only, offline content, sensor, and no-OpenAI readiness before field deployment.

Mapped Vapi dashboard surfaces to PhoneBio v1: Assistants/Phone Numbers/Tools/Logs active, Outbound/Evals for verification, Squads/Files/Structured Outputs/Boards deferred unless they reduce demo risk.
